channel.title: Consistency on simeononsecurity
channel.description: Recent content in Consistency on simeononsecurity

item.title: CompTIA SecAI+ (CY0-001): AI Governance, Risk, and Compliance
item.category: "CompTIA SecAI+ Course" , "AI Governance" , "Risk Management" , "Compliance" , "Responsible AI" , "AI Ethics" , "AI Security" , "CY0-001" , "NIST AI RMF" , "EU AI Act"
item.description: Master AI governance, risk, and compliance for the CompTIA SecAI+ CY0-001 exam. Learn AI governance structures, AI roles, responsible AI principles, AI-specific risks, shadow AI, and frameworks like the EU AI Act, OECD, ISO, and NIST AI RMF.

item.title: Streamline Windows Updates with Automation using Chocolatey, PSWindowsUpdate, and Startup Scripts
item.category: "Automation" , "Windows Updates" , "Windows 10" , "Powershell" , "Script" , "Chocolatey" , "PSWindowsUpdate" , "Startup Scripts" , "System Administrators" , "Windows Update Processes" , "Local Group Policy Editor" , "GP" , "GPO" , "Group Policy Objects" , "Package Manager" , "Consistency" , "Centralized Management" , "Security" , "Software Management" , "Microsoft Updates"
item.description: Learn how to automate Windows updates with a single reboot and save valuable time for system administrators using Chocolatey, PSWindowsUpdate, and Startup Scripts.
